Server: localhost, Account: BAY', "color": color }); if (data.releasesBehind < 0) { title = 'Cutting Edge'; message = 'You are on a pre-release or development version'; icon = 'fa-user-astronaut'; color = defaultColor; } else if (data.releasesBehind == 0) { title = 'Latest Version'; message = 'You are on the latest major version'; icon = 'fa-star'; color = defaultColor; } else if (data.releasesBehind == 1) { title = 'Newer Version Available'; message = 'There is a newer version available'; icon = 'fa-sync'; color = defaultColor; } else if (data.releasesBehind == 2) { title = 'You are Falling Behind'; message = 'You are now 2 full major releases behind'; icon = 'fa-exclamation-circle'; color = defaultColor; } else { title = 'You are Behind'; message = String.format('You are {0} major version(s) behind. You may drag and drop to reorganize the available tiles on the Main Menu. Tiles flow in columns of two-by-two as follows:
New Groups can be added by dragging a tile between two groups. A gray bar will appear. Dropping the tile here will insert a new grouping.
When adding or removing custom tiles the sort order is also saved. However if you only re-organize the tiles, you must click the Save button to save your changes.
The Naviga Main Menu allows each user to customize the order of their Tiles. Click this Save button to save the current sort order and grouping.
When you add or remove Shortcuts, sort order and grouping are automatically saved.

children.text: function RadWindowprompt_detectenter(id, ev, input) { if (!ev) ev = window.event; if (ev.keyCode == 13) { var but = input.parentNode.parentNode.getElementsByTagName("A")[0]; if (but) { if (but.click) but.click(); else if (but.onclick) { but.focus(); var click = but.onclick; but.onclick = null; if (click) click.call(but); } } return false; } else return true; }

'&' : '?'; var url = location.href; if (getQueryString('a_module', '') == '') { url += queryDelimiter + "a_module=" + activeModule; } var t = setTimeout(function () { location.href = url; }, 3000); console.log('Session Expired - Firing Auto-reload to Login Page'); } else { $get('timeLbl').innerHTML = seconds < 0 ? 0 : seconds; } } } function ContinueSession() { $find('eFooter_aLogoutAlert').hide(); displayingTimoutWarning = false; stopTimer('timeLeftCounter');
